description: Everyday Hair Design was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Founded in 2022, Everyday Hair Design emerged from a simple belief: everyone deserves access to natural, effective healing in their daily lives. Mrs. Hair opened our doors in New York City with a vision to make Traditional Chinese Medicine an approachable part of modern wellness routines for young professionals, busy parents, and anyone seeking balance in the city that never sleeps.

Our clinic was born from witnessing too many people struggling with stress, chronic pain, and fatigue while juggling demanding careers and family responsibilities. We saw the need for a healing space that understood the unique pressures of New York life and could offer both immediate relief and long-term wellness solutions rooted in thousands of years of proven practice.

Today, we're proud to serve our diverse community with compassionate care that honors both ancient wisdom and contemporary lifestyles. Whether you're dealing with work stress, seeking natural fertility support, or simply wanting to maintain optimal health, we're here to guide you on your journey to wellness using time-tested methods that work in harmony with your body's natural healing abilities.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Mrs. Hair has dedicated over four years to mastering the art and science of Traditional Chinese Medicine, driven by a profound respect for the body's innate wisdom to heal itself. Her journey into TCM began with her own transformative experience with acupuncture, which sparked a passion for helping others discover the profound benefits of natural healing approaches. She believes that true wellness comes from addressing not just symptoms, but the root patterns that create imbalance in our lives.

With extensive training in classical acupuncture techniques, Chinese herbal medicine, and complementary therapies like cupping and tuina massage, Mrs. Hair brings a comprehensive approach to each patient's care. Her practice philosophy centers on meeting people exactly where they are in their healing journey, whether they're new to TCM or longtime believers in natural medicine. She takes special joy in helping busy New Yorkers discover how ancient practices can seamlessly integrate into modern life.

What sets Mrs. Hair apart is her ability to translate complex TCM principles into practical, accessible guidance that empowers patients to take an active role in their wellness. She understands that each person's path to health is unique, and she crafts personalized treatment plans that honor individual constitutions, lifestyles, and health goals. Her warm, down-to-earth approach creates a safe space where healing can unfold naturally.

> Your body already knows how to heal – sometimes it just needs gentle guidance to remember the way.

**Mrs. Hair**
profile.name: Mrs. Hair
profile.title: L.Ac., NCCAOM

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Mrs. Hair addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Mrs. Hair takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Mrs. Hair collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Mrs. Hair's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Mrs. Hair has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
continuingEducation.title: Continuing Education & Training
continuingEducation.description: Mrs. Hair maintains active involvement in the TCM community and regularly pursues advanced training:
